content.json:
# AI Model Security Dashboard

Real-time view of malicious, risky, and unscanned AI models across Azure Machine Learning workspaces.

**Scope:** Defender for AI Services `AIModelScanner` extension + AML activity logs.

---

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProductName =~ "Microsoft Defender for Cloud"
| where AlertName startswith "Ai.AIModelScan"
| summarize Total = count(), High = countif(AlertSeverity == "High"), Medium = countif(AlertSeverity == "Medium"), UniqueIdentities = dcount(CompromisedEntity)

SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProductName =~ "Microsoft Defender for Cloud"
| where AlertName startswith "Ai.AIModelScan"
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), AlertSeverity
| render timechart

content.json:
## Top risky identities

Accounts or service principals that registered flagged models. Treat 2+ hits in 7 days as a high-severity incident.

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ProductName =~ "Microsoft Defender for Cloud"
| where AlertName startswith "Ai.AIModelScan"
| extend actor = coalesce(CompromisedEntity, tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name))
| summarize Alerts = count(), DistinctAlertTypes = dcount(AlertName), Samples = make_set(AlertName, 5) by actor
| sort by Alerts desc
| take 20

content.json:
## AML model registrations (last 24h)

Cross-reference against flagged alerts above. New registrations without a matching scan verdict are candidates for manual review.

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ResourceProvider =~ "Microsoft.MachineLearningServices"
| where OperationNameValue has "MODELS/WRITE"
| where ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, ResourceId, OperationNameValue
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
